case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. JONATHAN HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2023 CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 70425894) AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JONATHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70399406) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JONATHAN $1,494.54 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,766.44, SEE SCANNED DOC

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 70425894) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-26-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
